turns.content: Why does my Rust GUI app suddenly lose the ability to paste images from Windows when I switch to Linux, even though I'm using the same logic? I thought arboard was supposed to handle everything seamlessly across platforms so why is it failing on one side while the other works fine?

The confusion comes from assuming arboard's implementation automatically mirrors every OS clipboard format without checking. On Windows, arboard relies on the Windows Registry and the standard Win32 Clipboard Data structure to expose formats like rich text or images, whereas Linux uses X11 selection protocols where image data is often stored as a specific atom like 'image/png' rather than being directly accessible through the generic clipboard query. Your app likely only queries for basic string types via arboard::Clipboard::get_text, which works on both systems but silently ignores image formats until you explicitly request them using arboard::Image or by iterating over available formats with arboard::AvailableFormats to see what's actually supported.
